<!--
Thanks for contributing to Memstead! Keep the PR focused on one logical change.
For large or structural changes, please open an issue to discuss first.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Test plan

<!--
How did you verify this? Every change ships with a test plan:
- new behaviour → a new test
- a bug fix → a test that fails before and passes after
-->

- [ ] `./run-tests.sh` passes (engine both flavours + plugin)
- [ ] If a generated reference doc changed, it was regenerated with `xtask` (not hand-edited)

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused (one logical change)
- [ ] Commit message / description explains *why*, for a future reader
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or the public surface changed
